scripts.docker:build: docker compose build # Bygg Docker images
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d --force-recreate # Start containere med tvangsgenerering
scripts.docker:start: docker compose up -d # Start containere i frakoblet modus
scripts.docker:down: docker compose down # Stopp og fjern containere
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose down --rmi all # Fjern containere og images (behold database)
scripts.docker:clean:mysql: docker compose down -v --rmi all # Fjern alt inkludert database data
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose logs -f # Vis logger fra alle containere
scripts.docker:update: git pull && docker compose down && docker compose build && docker compose up -d # Hent siste kode og bygg containere
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose down && docker compose build && docker compose up -d # Bygg containere med cache
scripts.docker:reinstall: docker compose down && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d # Full gjenoppbygging uten cache
scripts.docker:cloudflared: bash -c 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then . .env.local; elif [ -f .env ]; then . .env; fi; docker run -d --name cloudflared --restart unless-stopped --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway -p 2917:2917 cloudflare/cloudflared:latest tunnel run --token $CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN' # Start Cloudflare tunnel for production. Path: Protect & Connect > Networking > Tunnels > Create a Tunnel. Velg Subdomain, Domain og Type: HTTP, URL: http://host.docker.internal:8001
scripts.docker:cloudflared:stop: docker stop cloudflared && docker rm cloudflared # Stopp Cloudflare tunnel container
scripts.dev:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build # Start development med HMR
scripts.dev:start: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d # Start development i frakoblet modus
scripts.dev:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down # Stopp development containere
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f # Vis development logger
scripts.dev:clean: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down --rmi all # Fjern containere og images (behold database)
scripts.dev:clean:mysql: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v --rmi all # Fjern alt inkludert database data
scripts.dev:frontend: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up frontend-dev --build # Start kun frontend med HMR
scripts.dev:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up backend-dev --build # Start kun backend med hot reload
scripts.dev:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up db -d # Start kun database
scripts.dev:rebuild: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up # Full gjenoppbygging development
scripts.dev:cloudflared: bash -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then . .env.development; fi; docker run -d --name cloudflared-dev --restart unless-stopped --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway -p 2918:2918 cloudflare/cloudflared:latest tunnel run --token $CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN' # Start Cloudflare tunnel for development. Path: Protect & Connect > Networking > Tunnels > Create a Tunnel. Velg Subdomain, Domain og Type: HTTP, URL: http://host.docker.internal:5173
scripts.dev:cloudflared:stop: docker stop cloudflared-dev && docker rm cloudflared-dev # Stopp Cloudflare tunnel container for development
